justification: The diff successfully migrates from Java 11/Spring Boot 2.7 to Java 21/Spring Boot 3.3, updating javax.* to jakarta.*, replacing deprecated Spring Security APIs (antMatchers -> requestMatchers, EnableGlobalMethodSecurity -> EnableMethodSecurity), and adopting Java 21 idioms like text blocks, pattern matching for instanceof, and List.getFirst()/getLast(). However, the YAML configuration changes contain significant formatting errors (e.g., misaligned comments in application-dev.yml and application-prod.yml, and malformed indentation in application.yml under management.metrics) that would likely break the application configuration. Additionally, the pom.xml still references an old Jib image (eclipse-temurin:11-jre-focal) which is inconsistent with the Java 21 target.
